title: oenothera pallida subsp. pallida
intro: Oenothera pallida subsp. pallida, also known as Pale Evening Primrose, is a perennial plant in the evening primrose family that is native to the prairies and dry areas of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pale Evening Primrose include reducing inflammation and pain, improving sleep quality, and supporting heart health, due to its high content of omega-6 fatty acids and other nutrients. The herbal preparations of Pale Evening Primrose include capsules, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to support skin health and alleviate symptoms of menopause and PMS.
